The claim states that the 2018 NBA All-Star Game will be held at the Staples Center in Los Angeles on February 18, 2018.

From the provided evidence:
- The key "2017–18 NBA season" has a value of 3, which likely refers to the number of games played during that season.
- The key "2018 NBA All-Star Game" has a value of 0, which suggests that the All-Star Game did not occur in 2018.

This directly contradicts the claim, which asserts that the 2018 NBA All-Star Game will be held on February 18, 2018.

### Conclusion:
**NOT_SUPPORTED**.
